mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately trigger negative equity repricing over the following week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 5-day returns in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE rises above the 0.5pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts creates a compounding demand shock that drives sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce a statistically significant positive alpha over 60-day horizons (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during periods of low inflation indicates healthy capacity utilization without pricing pressure, generating positive forward equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: The signal loses predictive power when CPIAUCSL exceeds 0.3% monthly growth, or 20-day forward returns turn negative in >50% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity that supports corporate earnings expectations, producing positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to correlate with 5-day forward returns (Rank IC < 0.01) across multiple rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A widening spread between the federal funds rate and real GDP growth indicates restrictive monetary policy relative to economic output, suppressing equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The negative predictive relationship reverses or becomes statistically insignificant when the FEDFUNDS-GDPC1 spread widens beyond historical extremes.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in real personal consumption expenditures exceeding 1.0% signals a sharp contraction in household spending that immediately depresses corporate revenue forecasts and equity prices.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 20-day returns remain positive in more than 55% of observations following a >1.0% RSAFS decline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during periods of high unemployment indicates early-cycle recovery dynamics that generate rapid positive equity repricing over the following week.
failure_condition: The mechanism fails when UNRATE falls below 5.0%, or when INDPRO acceleration does not yield positive 5-day returns in at least 60% of cases.
